skipRollConfig.name: Skip Roll Configuration Dialogs
skipRollConfig.hint: Skip the roll configuration dialog when rolling D20 Tests, damage, and healing rolls. Hold the Skip Dialog key (Shift by default) to show the dialogs.

skipActivityUsage.name: Skip Activity Usage Dialog
skipActivityUsage.hint: Skip the activity usage dialog where you confirm Consumption, Concentration, etc. Hold Shift to show the dialog.

autoRollDamage.name: Auto Roll Damage
autoRollDamage.hint: Automatically trigger the damage roll if the attack roll hits. For players, will only happen if Attack Roll Visibility is enabled.
